lse,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7380817565037104190","book_info":{"abstract":"【天才+女帝+玄幻+时空交汇+日常】
（第一卷女帝成长史已完结，前面构思不成熟写的有点不是太好，46章之后逐渐进入状态）
你听说过牛郎与织女吗？
天上一天，地上一年，最后他们化为彼此相望的星辰，每年只能见上一次面。
十八岁那年，刚刚成为道宗道子的莫千年就做了一个梦。
梦里，他看见了一个正在沐浴的少女，不过一场梦罢了，于是他大胆的吻了上去！
第二晚，他又做了一个梦，还是那个少女，他突然发现，这个梦，不一般！
第三晚.....第四晚....第五晚.....
渐渐的，莫千年发现，只要他睡觉，每天他都可以梦到同一个少女，但不一样的是.....
他这里一天，梦中世界却过去了一年！
他们也如同牛郎织女一般，隔着时空彼此守护。
不知道是第几次再次梦见少女时，昔日被他吻过的少女，已然成为了绝代女帝！
五十章之后每次见面写打油诗一首，摘取第一首。
最是空间叹离别，又道时间太无情。
待到天明耳目清，佳人远去独留影。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/22c3f048ac86eaa5293525754b3ca731","author":"米忽悠看刀","author_id":"","book_id":"7380817565037104190","book_name":"每天梦中吻女帝，别人结丹我入圣","book_short_name":"女帝有个约会","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a098b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7380967958987686462","read_count":"12822","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"558336"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"267","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,天才,女帝,架空,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/109ee19b06b60be5a3ab86364a7edab8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256417&x-signature=aoXUvFM2DDnwbkBrwDgTjDx9xsk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"94299275374","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"62"},"log
